test:coverage:split: slic pcov on --yes && slic run unit --coverage coverage/unit.cov && slic run feature --coverage coverage/feature.cov && slic run integration --coverage coverage/integration.cov && slic run wpunit --coverage coverage/wpunit.cov && slic run wpcli --coverage coverage/wpcli.cov; rc=$?; slic pcov off; exit $rc
test:coverage-html:split: slic pcov on --yes && slic run unit --coverage coverage/unit.cov && slic run feature --coverage coverage/feature.cov && slic run integration --coverage coverage/integration.cov && slic run wpunit --coverage coverage/wpunit.cov && slic run wpcli --coverage coverage/wpcli.cov; rc=$?; slic pcov off; exit $rc

scripts-descriptions.test: Run the fast PHPUnit unit and feature suites.
scripts-descriptions.test:slic: Run all Codeception suites through SLIC.
scripts-descriptions.test:slic:unit: Run the Codeception unit suite through SLIC.
scripts-descriptions.test:slic:feature: Run the Codeception feature suite through SLIC.
scripts-descriptions.test:integration: Run the WordPress-loaded integration suite through SLIC.
scripts-descriptions.test:wpunit: Run the WordPress-loaded wpunit suite through SLIC.
scripts-descriptions.test:wpcli: Run the shared WP-CLI command suite through SLIC.
scripts-descriptions.test:coverage: Generate merged Clover coverage from split SLIC suite artifacts.
scripts-descriptions.test:coverage-html: Generate merged Clover and HTML coverage from split SLIC suite artifacts.
scripts-descriptions.test:clean: Remove generated test coverage reports and serialized coverage artifacts.
scripts-descriptions.coverage:phpcov-install: Download the pinned phpcov PHAR used to merge split coverage artifacts.
scripts-descriptions.coverage:prepare: Create and clear the split coverage artifact directory.
scripts-descriptions.coverage:merge: Merge split coverage artifacts into clover.xml. Run through SLIC so container paths resolve.
scripts-descriptions.coverage:merge-html: Merge split coverage artifacts into clover.xml and HTML coverage. Run through SLIC so container paths resolve.
scripts-descriptions.test:coverage:split: Run SLIC suites separately, merge PHPUnit coverage artifacts, and generate clover.xml.
scripts-descriptions.test:coverage-html:split: Run SLIC suites separately, merge PHPUnit coverage artifacts, and generate clover.xml plus HTML coverage.
